hero.tagline: Audio and video content with a clear format and purpose
hero.headline: Podcasts, audiobooks, voiceovers and video formats with guidance from idea to final output.

about.headline: From idea to finished output. In one place.
about.body1: Alwaysfriday.live is a studio for audio and video content that isn’t made for one-time use but works over a longer horizon.
about.body2: We work in a calm environment, with clear guidance and a focus on making sure every format has good content, good sound and a usable output.

services.headline: Services
services.img02Desc: Professional image and sound without unnecessary production spectacle.
services.img03Desc: A space where you can spend hours focused purely on content.
services.quote: We don’t just handle the recording itself. We help keep the entire process together from the first idea to the final material.
services.quoteBody: The studio combines professional technical infrastructure with an environment where you can focus on the work for hours or even days without unnecessary interruption.

approach.headline: Approach
approach.ideaDesc: We help you clarify what needs to be created and in what format it will work.
approach.productionDesc: We record audio or video in our studio with a focus on a calm workflow and technical quality.
approach.directionDesc: We prepare the dramaturgy, session flow and help during the recording itself.
approach.outputDesc: You receive finished content ready for use and publication.
approach.img01Desc: Every format needs a different rhythm, different preparation and a different kind of guidance.
approach.img02Desc: We plan sessions so that a single recording produces as many usable outputs as possible.
approach.img03Desc: We don’t just deal with the technical side — we also focus on content, pacing and what should remain in the result.
approach.img04Desc: We prepare outputs so they’re immediately usable for web, audio platforms and social media.

model.subtitle: Creative Subscription
model.whatIsSessionContent: A session is a single production block in which multiple outputs are created at once. You come in once and leave with content you can use in the weeks ahead.
model.whatIsSessionCombine: Within a single session we can combine:
model.whatIsSessionItem5: teaser, trailer or short promo piece
model.whatIsSessionResult: A single session can produce a long-form piece, an audio version and short-form content for social media.
model.whatIsSessionGuarantee: We handle dramaturgy, production and technical execution so that the result makes sense as a whole.
model.howSubscriptionIntro: It doesn’t matter where you start. We build the collaboration so that individual parts connect naturally.
model.howSubscriptionProblem: Typically, clients handle design, production and follow-up outputs separately. That means more handoffs, more briefings and less context.
model.howSubscriptionDifferent: With us, Studio, Live and Space connect seamlessly — so content, visuals and production don’t happen in isolation.
model.howSubscriptionConclusion: Instead of multiple vendors, you have one team that keeps outputs together — in content, visuals and production.
model.whySubscriptionIntro: Content works better when it has regularity, continuity and a clear direction.
model.whyConsistencyDesc: Regular content is easier to build than a series of one-off outputs.
model.whyDepthDesc: When we know the brand, the voice and the audience, we build on previous work instead of starting from scratch every time.
model.whyFlexibilityDesc: The scope of work can be adjusted as you go, depending on what’s needed most at the time.
model.whyClarityDesc: From the start, you know what you’re getting, at what scope and under what terms.
model.sessionDesc: For brands and individuals who want to build a functional foundation and start publishing without unnecessary complexity.
model.sessionLiveItem4Bold: Distribution, frequency and naming convention setup
model.sessionStudioItem1Sub: Lower thirds, subtitles, thumbnail templates and cover art
model.quote: Every project has a different scope and a different need. We’re happy to walk you through what makes sense as a one-off and what should build on an ongoing collaboration.

contact.thankYou: Thank you. We'll get back to you soon.
contact.placeholderMessage: DESCRIBE YOUR PLAN OR WHAT YOU’RE INTERESTED IN
